mxCell.value: users -------------------------- + id: ULID (PK) + name, email(UQ), password + role: enum(engineer|teacher|admin) # teacher_approved_by: ULID (nullable) + google_id: string (nullable, UQ) + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + approvedBy(): BelongsTo User + taughtTrainingPaths(): HasMany TrainingPath + payments(): HasMany Payment + notifications(): HasMany Notification
sessions -------------------------- + id: string (PK) # user_id: ULID (nullable) + ip_address, user_agent, payload + last_activity -------------------------- + user(): BelongsTo User (logical)
password_reset_tokens -------------------------- + email: string (PK) + token + created_at -------------------------- + Laravel auth infrastructure
notifications -------------------------- + id: UUID (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + type, title, message + data, action_url, read_at + created_at -------------------------- + user(): BelongsTo User
searches -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (nullable FK) + query, results_count + ip_address, user_agent + created_at -------------------------- + user(): BelongsTo User

activity_logs -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (nullable FK) + type, action, description + ip_address, metadata, status + created_at -------------------------- + user(): BelongsTo User

system_alerts -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + severity, title, source + acknowledged, resolved # acknowledged_by: ULID (nullable FK) + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + acknowledgedByUser(): BelongsTo User

guacamole_connection_preferences -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + vm_session_type, profile_name + is_default, parameters(JSON) + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + user(): BelongsTo User

user_vm_connection_default_profiles -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + vm_id, vm_session_protocol + preferred_profile_name + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + user(): BelongsTo User
jobs -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + queue, payload, attempts + reserved_at, available_at + created_at
job_batches -------------------------- + id: string (PK) + name, total_jobs, pending_jobs + failed_jobs, failed_job_ids + options, cancelled_at, finished_at
failed_jobs -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + uuid(UQ), connection, queue + payload, exception + failed_at
users (reference) -------------------------- + id: ULID (PK) + role, email + shared identity hub

proxmox_servers -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + name (UQ), realm, verify_ssl - host, port, token_id, token_secret (encrypted) # created_by: ULID (nullable FK) + is_active, capacity tuning fields -------------------------- + createdBy(), nodes(), vmSessions(), credentialLogs()

proxmox_nodes -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # proxmox_server_id: bigint (FK) + name, hostname, api_url + status, max_vms, current_vm_count -------------------------- + proxmoxServer(), vmSessions()

node_credentials_log -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # proxmox_server_id: bigint (FK) # changed_by: ULID (nullable FK) + action, ip_address, details + created_at -------------------------- + proxmoxServer(), user()

vm_sessions -------------------------- + id: ULID (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # proxmox_server_id: bigint (FK) # node_id: bigint (nullable FK) + vm_id, status, protocol, ip_address + guacamole_connection_id/token + expires_at -------------------------- + user(), proxmoxServer(), node() + attachedDevices(), deviceQueueEntries()

gateway_nodes -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + name, ip, port (composite UQ) + online, is_verified + proxmox_vmid/node + last_seen_at -------------------------- + usbDevices(), cameras()

usb_devices -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # gateway_node_id: bigint (FK) # attached_session_id: ULID (nullable FK) # pending_server_id: bigint (nullable FK) # dedicated_server_id: bigint (nullable FK) + busid, vendor_id, product_id, name + status, is_camera, usbip_port + pending/dedicated VM metadata -------------------------- + gatewayNode(), attachedSession() + queueEntries(), reservations(), camera() + pendingServer(), dedicatedServer()

usb_device_queue -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # usb_device_id: bigint (FK) # session_id: ULID (FK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + position, queued_at, notified_at -------------------------- + device(), session(), user()
robots -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + identifier (UQ), name + status, ip_address -------------------------- + cameras(): HasMany

cameras -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # robot_id: bigint (nullable FK) # gateway_node_id: bigint (nullable FK) # usb_device_id: bigint (nullable FK) + assigned_vm_id, name, stream_key(UQ) + type, status, ptz_capable + recording_enabled, detection_enabled -------------------------- + robot(), gatewayNode(), usbDevice() + sessionControls(), reservations()

camera_session_controls -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # camera_id: bigint (FK) # session_id: ULID (FK) + acquired_at, released_at + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + camera(), session()

reservations -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + reservable_type, reservable_id (morph) # user_id: ULID (FK) # approved_by: ULID (nullable FK) # target_user_id: ULID (nullable FK) + status, priority, requested/approved/actual times + target_vm_id, purpose, admin_notes -------------------------- + reservable(): MorphTo + user(), approvedBy(), approver()
polymorphic | reservations.reservable_* → cameras | Eloquent: Reservation::reservable() / Camera::reservations()
polymorphic | reservations.reservable_* → usb_devices | Eloquent: Reservation::reservable() / UsbDevice::reservations()
proxmox_nodes (reference) -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + source for VM assignment node_id

training_paths -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # instructor_id: ULID (FK) + title, category, level, status + has_virtual_machine, price_cents, is_free + is_featured, featured_order -------------------------- + instructor(), modules(), trainingUnits() + enrollments(), engineers(), payments()

training_path_modules -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) + title, sort_order + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + trainingPath(), trainingUnits()

training_units -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # module_id: bigint (FK) + title, type, duration, vm_enabled + video_url, resources, sort_order -------------------------- + module(), trainingPath() (derived) + progress(), quiz(), article(), video(), vmAssignment()

training_unit_progress -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # training_unit_id: bigint (FK) + status, progress_percentage + video_watch_percentage/time + started_at, completed_at -------------------------- + user(), trainingUnit()

training_path_enrollments -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) + enrolled_at, completed_at + progress_percentage -------------------------- + user(), trainingPath()

training_unit_vm_assignments -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_unit_id: bigint (FK) # node_id: bigint (nullable FK) # assigned_by: ULID (nullable FK) # approved_by: ULID (nullable FK) + status, vm_id, vm_name, template_id + is_direct_vm, notes, feedback -------------------------- + trainingUnit(), node() + assignedByUser(), approvedByUser()

training_unit_notes -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # training_unit_id: bigint (FK) + content, timestamp_seconds + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + user(), trainingUnit()

training_path_reviews -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + rating, review, is_featured + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + trainingPath(), user()

daily_training_path_stats -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) + date, enrollments, completions + active_engineers, quiz_attempts/passes + revenue_cents -------------------------- + trainingPath()

certificates -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) + serial_number(UQ), issued_at + certificate_data/json -------------------------- + user(), trainingPath()

videos -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_unit_id: bigint (FK) + original_filename, storage_path, storage_disk + duration_seconds, mime_type, status + thumbnail_path, hls_path, available_qualities -------------------------- + trainingUnit(), captions(), progress()
captions -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # video_id: bigint (FK) + language, label + file_path, is_default -------------------------- + video(): BelongsTo

video_progress -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # video_id: bigint (FK) + watched_seconds, total_watch_time + completed, last_watched_at -------------------------- + user(), video()
articles -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_unit_id: bigint (FK, UQ) + content(JSON), word_count + estimated_read_time_minutes -------------------------- + trainingUnit()

quizzes -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_unit_id: bigint (FK, UQ) + title, passing_score, time_limit_minutes + max_attempts, shuffle flags + is_published -------------------------- + trainingUnit(), questions(), attempts()
quiz_questions -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # quiz_id: bigint (FK) + type, question, explanation + points, sort_order -------------------------- + quiz(), options(), answers()
quiz_question_options -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # question_id: bigint (FK) + option_text, is_correct + sort_order -------------------------- + question()

quiz_attempts -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # quiz_id: bigint (FK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + score, total_points, percentage, passed + started_at, completed_at -------------------------- + quiz(), user(), answers()

quiz_attempt_answers -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # attempt_id: bigint (FK) # question_id: bigint (FK) # selected_option_id: bigint (nullable FK) + text_answer, is_correct, points_earned -------------------------- + attempt(), question(), selectedOption()
M:N via training_path_enrollments | Eloquent: User::enrolledTrainingPaths() ↔ TrainingPath::engineers()

payments -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) + stripe_session_id(UQ), stripe_payment_intent_id(UQ) + status, amount_cents, currency, paid_at -------------------------- + user(), trainingPath(), refundRequests()

refund_requests -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # payment_id: bigint (FK, UQ) # user_id: ULID (FK) + status, reason, admin_notes + stripe_refund_id(UQ), refund_amount_cents -------------------------- + payment(), user()

payout_requests -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) # approved_by: ULID (nullable FK) + amount_cents, currency, payout_method + status, stripe_transfer_id(UQ) + approved_at, processed_at, completed_at -------------------------- + user(), approver()
stripe_webhooks -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) + stripe_event_id (UQ) + event_type, payload(JSON) + processed, error_message, attempts + processed_at, created_at, updated_at

discussion_threads -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # training_unit_id: bigint (nullable FK) # training_path_id: bigint (FK) # author_id: ULID (FK) # last_reply_by: ULID (nullable FK) + title, content, status, pin/lock/flag + view_count, reply_count, upvote_count -------------------------- + trainingUnit(), trainingPath(), author() + lastReplyAuthor(), replies(), votes()

thread_replies -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # thread_id: bigint (FK) # author_id: ULID (FK) # parent_id: bigint (nullable FK self) + content, is_answer, is_flagged + upvote_count -------------------------- + thread(), author(), parent(), children(), votes()

thread_votes -------------------------- + id: bigint (PK) # user_id: ULID (FK) + votable_type, votable_id (morph) + value (-1, +1) + created_at, updated_at -------------------------- + user(), votable()
polymorphic | thread_votes.votable_* → discussion_threads | Eloquent: ThreadVote::votable() / DiscussionThread::votes()
polymorphic | thread_votes.votable_* → thread_replies | Eloquent: ThreadVote::votable() / ThreadReply::votes()

IoT-REAP UML Legend -------------------------- Node sections: table name / key attributes / relation methods Edge labels include: cardinality + FK column + Eloquent method names Dashed edges: polymorphic or derived non-FK relations Gray dashed nodes: cross-page reference entities -------------------------- Pages 01 Core and Framework tables 02 Infrastructure VM Gateway Robotics 03 Training Content and Assessment 04 Commerce Community and Voting

Coverage checklist (all migration tables represented) -------------------------- Auth and framework: users, password_reset_tokens, sessions, cache, cache_locks, jobs, job_batches, failed_jobs Core app support: notifications, searches, system_alerts, activity_logs, guacamole_connection_preferences, user_vm_connection_default_profiles Infrastructure runtime: proxmox_servers, proxmox_nodes, node_credentials_log, vm_sessions, gateway_nodes, usb_devices, usb_device_queue, robots, cameras, camera_session_controls, reservations Training and content: training_paths, training_path_modules, training_units, training_unit_progress, training_path_enrollments, training_unit_vm_assignments, training_unit_notes, training_path_reviews, daily_training_path_stats, certificates, videos, captions, video_progress, articles, quizzes, quiz_questions, quiz_question_options, quiz_attempts, quiz_attempt_answers Commerce and community: payments, refund_requests, payout_requests, stripe_webhooks, discussion_threads, thread_replies, thread_votes -------------------------- Total tables represented: 51 Relationship coverage: FK + polymorphic + M:N + derived hasManyThrough
